common.placeholder: Operational flow will be added in next stacks.
access.denied.unbound: Access denied: account is not bound to a staff actor.
access.denied.role: Access denied: your role cannot open this surface.
admin.reference.empty: Clinic reference data has not been loaded yet.
patient.booking.session.missing: Booking session is missing. Send /book again.
patient.booking.service.prompt: Choose a service to begin booking.
patient.booking.resume.review: Your booking is ready to finalize. Share contact again to continue.
patient.booking.resume.terminal: This booking session is already terminal. Send /book to start a new one.
patient.booking.callback.stale: This button is no longer active. Please use /book to continue.
patient.booking.slot.prompt: Choose one of the nearest available slots.
patient.booking.slot.empty: No open slots found yet. Please try again shortly.
patient.booking.slot.unavailable: That slot is no longer available. Please choose another one.
patient.booking.contact.prompt: Share your phone contact or type the number in chat.
patient.booking.review.invalid: We could not prepare this booking for confirmation. Please restart with /book.
patient.booking.finalize.invalid_state: Booking could not be finalized from the current state.
patient.booking.finalize.slot_unavailabl: The selected slot is no longer available.
patient.booking.finalize.conflict: This slot was just booked by another patient. Please choose a different slot.
patient.booking.escalated: We found multiple patients with this contact. For your privacy, the clinic admin will contact you directly.
patient.booking.my.contact_prompt: To open your booking controls, share the same phone you used in clinic records.
patient.booking.my.no_match: We could not find an upcoming booking for this contact.
patient.booking.waitlist.created: Done. We noted your earlier-slot request and the clinic will contact you if one opens.
patient.booking.cancel.confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this booking?
patient.booking.card.next.confirmed: Arrive on time; contact clinic for changes.
patient.booking.card.next.reschedule_req: Clinic will contact you to reschedule.
patient.booking.card.next.default: Contact clinic if you need help.
